name: Magický úložný batoh
description: Přenosný magcký nástroj, který ti dovoluje přenášet
mnohem více věcí než je běžné. I přes to,
aji magické nástroje mají svoje limity…
ability: Kapacita zbraní: ${QJ.MPMZ.tl.ex_playerCheckInventory('weapon')}
Kapacita vybavení: ${QJ.MPMZ.tl.ex_playerCheckInventory('gear')}

name: Tisíce kroků
description: Rychlý úkrok na zemi pokryje krátkou vzdálenost,
který ti umožní vyhnout se některým útokům. Je to pouze začátečnická
technika, ale uživatel trval na cool jménu.
ability: Podrž mezerník pro aktivaci

name: Senpo Tachi
description: Meč-tasící technika kterou ses naučil od mladého mistra meče.
Kombinací s Tisíce kroky, vyšleš rychlostí posílený
úder — dostatečný k odražení nepřátel, když dobře načasováno.
ability: Stistkni levé tlačítko myši během Tisíce kroků: Sečný úder, poškození se škáluje s rychlostí
Drž pravé tlačítko myši během Tisíce kroků: Charge, efekt se škáluje s momentem
mobileAbility: Klikny schopnost pro sečný úder, poškození se škáluje s rychlostí
Podrž schopnost pro nabití útoku, efekt se škáluje s momentem

name: Whirlwind Slash
description: Toč se během máchání tvojí zbraní pro vyslání meustálých útoků.
Rychlost útoku se během času zrychluje. Pro ty, kteří nejsou výborní
s technikou šermování, je tato schopnost jednoduchá na naučení a efektivní.
ability: Podrž pravé tlačítko myši pro aktivaci schopnosti
Přeruš točení pro hození své zbraně
mobileAbility: Přeruš točení pro hození své zbraně

name: Lucky Pervert
subtitle: true
description: A legendary perverted constitution that activates on its own,
even without the user realizing it.
As if blessed and guided by an unseen goddess, irresistible forces
push you into blush-inducing, heart-pounding fanservice scenarios…!
ability: Always creates the perfect opportunities to trigger lewd events!

name: Danger Sense
description: Often called ‘Mind's Eye’, but it's actually a sense
sharpened by countless brushes with death.
In other words, more like a trauma reflex than an actual skill...
ability: Hover the mouse over the target to view detailed info
mobileAbility: Tap the target to view detailed info

name: Air king
description: Caves, cliffs, the open sky... he's fallen from just about everywhere.
Even after being battered to the brink of death again and again,
he always somehow manages to cling to his last breath.
One day, this man will cast off gravity itself and truly conquer the sky...!
ability: When fatal fall damage is taken, forcibly survive with 1 HP
Can trigger at most once per day

name: Breath Concealment
subtitle: true
description: A ninja technique. I only picked it up in a rush, but…
somehow, I got the hang of it pretty quickly.
ability: Press Shift while active to enter stealth
Reduces the monster's detection range by \c[17]${1+$gameParty.leader().skillMasteryLevel(10)}\c[108] tile
Reduces \str[120]’s alert increase rate during peeking by \c[17]${15+15*$gameParty.leader().skillMasteryLevel(10)}%\c[0]

name: Backstab
subtitle: true
description: A ninja technique. Can be activated while in stealth
Strike an unguarded enemy from behind for massive damage!
ability: Úroveň schoposti: \c[6]${$gameActors.actor(1).skillMasteryUses(11)}\c[0]
Bonusové poškození za asasinaci: \c[17]${Math.round(200 + (2333 - 200) * Math.pow($gameActors.actor(1).skillMasteryLevel(11) / 9, 1.8))}%\c[0]

name: Musou Burst Stream
description: A secret finisher inherited from ASABA, who embraced sorrow
In an instant too fast for the eye to see, a hundred strikes land—
leaving the enemy with nothing but final darkness!
ability: Skill command:  \{⬆⬇⬅⮕⬆⬇\}
Each use of the skill consumes some HP

name: Crossdressing
description: You put on clothes not meant for you… and something inside you
stirred. No combat bonus—might even mess with your head a little.
Your companions glance oddly, and enemies might pause… maybe.
After all, in this world—cuteness is justice!
ability: Increases Sin based on the number of crossdressing items equipped!

name: Bladekeepers
description: "No matter how you swing your weapons!" "We’ll rise to call you out!"
"To stop the blades from wearing away!" "To protect the dignity of arms!"
"For we believe the sword is master, and humans are but servants!"
"The most absurd yet unshakable believers!"
"We are—Weapon Preservationists—the Bladekeepers!"
ability: Wearing the badge makes you one of them now

name: Weapon Break
description: All weapons have durability limits,
and since the user isn’t good at precise attacks.
there’s a risk of breaking them. But when the weapon does break —
it’ll land a powerful critical hit!
ability: Final hit damage boost: \c[6]${200+(100*$gameActors.actor(1).skillMasteryLevel(48))}%\c[0]

name: Šermířksý trénink
subtitle: pravda
description: Sought advice from a swordmaster girl on how to get stronger
All she said was ‘Just swing your sword 1,000 times every day!’
—Will that really work!? Anyway, let’s give it a try...
ability: Practice Swings Completed: \{\c[6]${QJ.MPMZ.tl.playerSwordsmanshipTraining(1)}\c[0]
Base attack damage of melee weapons increased by \c[6]${QJ.MPMZ.tl.playerSwordsmanshipTraining(2)}%
